cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Mr. Suresh Menon? Sir, ji, I'm calling from Passport Seva Kendra's support line.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes, this is Suresh. I had lodged a query on your website regarding my passport application status.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, Mr. Menon, I've checked on your query, and it seems there was a minor issue with your application form. Can you please confirm your ticket number so I can assist you further?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, my ticket number is... let me check... yes, it's PSKT202304001234.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, Mr. Menon. I've located your query. The issue was with the attachment of your ID proof. Can you please re-upload your ID proof, and we'll process your application?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, sir. I'll do that right away. But can you also tell me how long it will take to process my application after I upload the required documents?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Once we receive the correct documents, it usually takes about 3 to 4 working days to process the application. But I'll make a note to expedite your application, Mr. Menon.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That's great, thank you so much for your help, sir. You've really clarified things for me.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 105s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An agent from the Passport Seva Kendra's support line calls a user back in response to a query the user had lodged on the official website. The agent provides the resolution or required information.
